title: Mission Boon
description: Generates a mission-wide advantage or payoff.
entries: A local owes you a favor and will spend it here
You know one thing they are sure you don't
The pay doubles if no one gets hurt
There's a back way in, if you can find it
Someone inside wants them to fail too
You have more time than they think you do
A rival of the enemy will look the other way
The tools you need are already on site
One guard can be bought for the right price
A map exists, incomplete but real
Bad blood divides the ones against you
You've done this before and remember the trick
Help arrives if you can hold out until dark
The prize is closer to the door than expected
A distraction is yours to trigger when you choose
Someone owes the enemy nothing and knows a secret
The reward grows the cleaner you leave it
You're underestimated, and that can be used
A safe place waits for you when it's done
The password still works, for now
One honest face on the other side will hear you out
There's a moment each day when the guard drops
An old ally is closer than you dared hope
Word of your success is worth more than the coin
